evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS ■ 4 miles of offset bus lanes with bus bulb stations ■ For the entire route: – Low-floor buses – Off board fare collection – Station and bus branding – Transit signal priority – Pedestrian safety improvements

Pedestrian neckdowns: Points to a narrow pedestrian crossing area on the left side of the street. SBS Station / Bus Bulb: Points to a bus stop area with a shelter and a bus. Pedestrian refuge islands and greening: Points to a small pedestrian refuge island with a tree in the middle of the intersection.
Neckdown / curb extension
Pedestrian refuge / Median

proposed_relations.description: Cross Bronx Expressway intersection improvements: left-turn ban, dual right-turn lanes, SB bus-only queue jump, convert Ittner Place to one-way

evidence_refs.source_quote: Banning left-turns at CBE on-ramp... Dual right-turning lanes better accommodate the high vehicle volumes accessing the CBE. SB Bus-Only Queue Jump allows buses to get ahead of traffic where there is no bus lane. Convert Ittner Place to one-way to improve access onto the CBE.

decisions.rationale: p024_c0002 describes the Cross Bronx Expressway intersection as part of the Webster Avenue SBS traffic improvements, with explicit callouts for banning left turns, dual right-turn lanes, SB bus-only queue jump, and converting Ittner Place to one-way.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Banning left-turns at CBE on-ramp... Dual right-turning lanes better accommodate the high vehicle volumes accessing the CBE. SB Bus-Only Queue Jump allows buses to get ahead of traffic where there is no bus lane. Convert Ittner Place to one-way to improve access onto the CBE.

proposed_relations.description: Fordham Road intersection improvements: lengthened left-turn bays, NB and SB right-turn bays, banned EB and WB left-turns, signal time reallocated to Webster Ave

evidence_refs.source_quote: Lengthened Left-Turn Bays create more storage space for heavy left-turning volumes
NB and SB right-turn bays add storage space for turning vehicles and keep the bus lane clear
Banned EB and WB left-turns simplify intersection operations. Saved signal time goes to Webster Ave
